creator: krok@gmx.net
text:
My friend 've written a driver for Digiboard PC/Xem multiport adapters.
As I know its not included in FreeBSD release. FreeBSD have driver only
for PC/Xi adapters (as far as I know) Can I send new driver to you?
Its about 300K 

URL to driver sources is: http://www.paranoia.spb.ru/digiboard
